name: @cobdfamily/cobdcorekit
description: COBDCoreKit: the single client API that runs in the page (the top-level Capacitor WebView) and calls the Capacitor plugins directly — torch, geolocation (navigator shim), in-app browser, nav, pdf — plus the capability→native-permission map. No iframe, no host bridge. Replaces the former cobdcorekit + cobdhostkit split.
